div.p: Correct LE Integer for x86 comparison.
Network protocols use Big-Endian. x86 CPUs use Little-Endian. Direct bit comparison if(port == 80) without ntohs results in 0x0050 == 0x5000 which evaluates to False.
eBPF verifier prefers bitwise shifts over __builtin_bswap16 in some older kernel versions to ensure compatibility across LLVM backends.
CPU Register (Little Endian Load) Read as u16: 0x5000 (Decimal: 20480)
